mapper.select: select id, title, content, is_top, status, publisher_id, create_time, update_time from notice where status = 1 order by is_top desc, create_time desc
select id, title, content, is_top, status, publisher_id, create_time, update_time from notice where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into notice (title, content, is_top, status, publisher_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{isTop}, #{status}, #{publisherId}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update notice set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_top = #{isTop}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
